scope.purpose: incremental official/high-trust source audit before any database or candidate promotion

safety.openPullRequestCheck: Open PR check found only non-overlapping report-generator PR #111 before branch creation; no open PL Athlete Research data PR for this lot range was found.
safety.duplicateCheck: Repository checks found no existing data/research-batches file for lot91-95 before creation.
safety.noInferencePolicy: No achievements, same-person identity links, or record claims were inferred. Only roster identity from main database was used, and no official prior-history row was promoted in this run.

sourceChecks.name: Repository main database skeleton
sourceChecks.usedFor: Confirmed roster identities, lot numbers, aliases, and v5.9.6_LOCK preservation target.

sourceChecks.name: GitHub open pull request search
sourceChecks.usedFor: Checked for open overlapping PL Athlete Research PRs before branch creation; found only non-overlapping PR #111.

sourceChecks.name: HPA official 2026 Numata Bench Press速報 F/G PDF
sourceChecks.usedFor: Target current-event source for Lot91-95. This run did not promote the current-event rows to database.json.

sourceChecks.name: HPA official 2025 Hokkaido-Tohoku Block Bench Press result PDF
sourceChecks.usedFor: Checked prior single bench press histories for this lot range; no row was captured for promotion or candidate addition in this run.

sourceChecks.name: HPA official 2026 Spring Ebetsu PL result PDF
sourceChecks.usedFor: Checked domestic Hokkaido three-lift PL history target for this lot range; no row was captured for promotion or candidate addition in this run.

sourceChecks.name: JPA/IPF/Goodlift broad checks
sourceChecks.usedFor: Romanized-name and exact-name checks for national/international/world histories; no reliable additional row was captured in this batch.

result.summary: Lot 91-95 were audited as a small batch. No confirmed prior-history row was promoted and no uncertain row was added. v5.9.6_LOCK and A4 print layout were preserved.
